@if (label()) { {{ label() }} @if (additionalLabel(); as additionalLabel) { @if (typeof additionalLabel === 'string') { {{ additionalLabel }} } @else { } } }
@if (fileAttachmentControl()) { }
@if (attachmentControl() && attachmentControl()?.length > 0) { @for (control of attachmentControl(); track control; let i = $index) { } }
